description: OpenHands hooks for the W3A bundle. Setup builds the conformance kit; the pre-commit-style check keeps the spec mirror and bundle gates intact.

setup.description: Fetch the Go module cache and run bundle-check once on workspace prepare.

verify.description: Validate manifests, the byte-identical spec mirror, golden vectors, and builder gates.

operating_rules: Authoring LLM output is an untrusted suggestion, never a gate.
Deterministic code enforces schema ownership, secret scan, risk/confirm policy, canonicalization, lint, and trust state.
Never write user credentials, repository secrets, local paths, or chat logs into a generated .w3a or this package.
